title: GoalState
description: User-defined goals with computed time-to-goal and required contribution (FR-CORE-004). Provided by Module 0; consumed wherever a monetary value needs time-to-goal context (FR-X-004). All amounts integer cents; time-to-goal is computed deterministically from current contribution pace and is freshness-stamped because it depends on balance/cash-flow inputs.

name.description: User-provided goal name (displayed verbatim; not translated).

current_amount.description: Amount saved so far toward the goal, integer cents.

target_date.description: Optional user-set deadline; drives ahead/behind computation.

required_monthly_contribution.description: Required monthly contribution to hit target by target_date, integer cents (computed in arbitrary precision, half-up at the final cent).

projected_completion_date.description: Projected completion at current pace; null if pace is zero/unknown.

time_to_goal_days.description: Computed days to completion at current pace; null if not computable (pace unknown).

pace_status.description: unknown when inputs are insufficient — never guessed.

freshness.description: time_to_goal/pace depend on freshness-stamped balance & cash-flow inputs; stale ⇒ pace context flagged.
